data.title: Russia must use crypto to develop its economy, finance ministry says
data.description:
Russia should have a strategy that allows it to use cryptocurrencies to develop its economy, according to a top representative of the country’s finance ministry. The call for a comprehensive approach to regulating the digital assets market comes after, earlier this month, the Russian Treasury urged for wider investor access to crypto. Finance ministry official […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/russia-must-use-crypto-to-develop-its-economy-finance-ministry-says/

data.title: What is Story Protocol and Why is it Taking Over Crypto? — Why IP Token is a Must Buy in 2025
data.description:
"Story Protocol is an innovative framework that is reshaping the landscape of the cryptocurrency industry, and its rapid ascendance has raised intrigue among investors and tech enthusiasts alike. As we delve into the reasons behind its rising prominence, it's essential to understand the unique features and benefits that make Story Protocol stand out in the crowded crypto market. One significant aspect of this development is the introduction of the IP Token, which is anticipated to become a crucial asset for investors in the coming years. With projections suggesting a significant increase in its value and utility by 2025, many experts are recommending that savvy investors consider adding the IP Token to their portfolios. This article will explore the fundamentals of Story Protocol, analyze its influence on the crypto market, and outline why acquiring IP tokens now could be a strategic move for future financial success."
source: https://blocknews.com/what-is-story-protocol-and-why-is-it-taking-over-crypto-why-ip-token-is-a-must-buy-in-2025/

data.title: Missouri Man Masterminds $1,200,000 Check Fraud Scheme That Recruited Collaborators Over Instagram
data.description:
A Missouri man is headed to prison after orchestrating a bank fraud scheme using checks stolen in the mail. Last week, a US district judge sentenced Malik Jones, 28, to 42 months in prison after he pleaded guilty in 2024 to one count of bank fraud and one count of aggravated identity theft.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/09/24/missouri-man-masterminds-1200000-check-fraud-scheme-that-recruited-collaborators-over-instagram/

data.title: Nasdaq-Listed Helius Medical Technologies Bags Over 760,190 SOL For Its New $500 Million Solana Treasury
data.description:
Pantera-backed Helius Medical Technologies has purchased its first Solana tokens, marking the start of a corporate treasury reserve built around the sixth-largest cryptocurrency by market capitalization. The company now holds approximately 760,190 tokens, valued at around $167 million, at an average cost of $231 per SOL. Shares of Helius Medical soared over 200% on Sept. […]
source: https://zycrypto.com/nasdaq-listed-helius-medical-technologies-bags-over-760190-sol-for-its-new-500-million-solana-treasury/
